items.final_wording: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults undergoing blood-pressure measurement, hypertension assessment, or monitoring, including adults with type 2 diabetes where specified.
source.setting: Primary care, outpatient review, home or ambulatory monitoring, and specialist referral pathways.
source.exclusions: Exact for blood-pressure device technique, clinic measurement, ABPM and HBPM result review, cardiovascular-risk context, monitoring, annual review, and documented high-risk features. Diagnostic conclusions, targets, treatment, medicines, and referrals are not generated or mapped. The postural-hypotension section additionally supports clinician-entered orthostatic blood-pressure documentation without automatic diagnosis or management. exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1-1.2.13 - clinic, ambulatory, and home blood-pressure assessment

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

items.rationale: The exact NICE section supports documenting ABPM source, date, measurement schedule, averages, clinician interpretation, symptoms, questions, and an entered plan without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

items.final_wording: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.
